name: playwright-agent-ui
description: Webview UI that drives the .github/agents Playwright test-automation pipeline via VS Code's Copilot Chat model API (vscode.lm).

playwrightAgent.bridgePort.description: Loopback port the standalone web UI connects to (http://localhost:<port>).

scripts.build: esbuild src/extension.ts --bundle --platform=node --external:vscode --outfile=dist/extension.js --format=cjs && mkdir -p dist/webview && cp src/webview/index.html dist/webview/index.html
